content: Increasing preventive care utilization requires multi-level strategies: (1) System-level - electronic health record reminders, standing orders enabling nurses to vaccinate without physician order, patient registries tracking due services; (2) Provider-level - audit/feedback on screening rates, default ordering for eligible patients; (3) Patient-level - outreach calls/texts, reducing out-of-pocket costs (ACA eliminated cost-sharing for USPSTF A/B recommendations), navigation assistance; (4) Community-level - pharmacy-based vaccination, mobile screening units, workplace wellness programs. Multifaceted interventions increase colorectal cancer screening by 20-30 percentage points versus single strategies (10-15 points).
